name: M4A4 | 反冲精英
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. A custom paint job in the style of Japanese animation has been applied and depicts a female CT agent fighting against a T-side rush. \"Stand your ground!\"
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器使用日本动漫风格进行了自定义涂装，图案描绘了一名女性CT探员正与冲锋的T方作战。 “不许动！”
